page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.gn5i server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and runs on the KVM hypervisor. The instance features 4 dedicated physical CPU cores with 1 thread per core, providing 4 vCPUs with dedicated CPU allocation. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration workloads, the instance includes a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of total VRAM. This server does not include any local storage, meaning storage must be attached externally. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the inclusion of a dedicated NVIDIA P4 GPU alongside a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for entry-level GPU-accelerated tasks. The hardware profile is suitable for workloads such as small-scale inference, video transcoding, and lightweight deep learning workloads. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the older generation GPU architecture provides a lower-cost entry point for GPU compute resources compared to newer, high-density accelerator instances, though it lacks modern tensor core capabilities.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance within the ecs.gn5i family, running on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture. It features 4 dedicated physical CPU cores (4 vCPUs) with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA P4 GPU providing 8 GB of VRAM, making it suitable for entry-level parallel processing tasks. It does not include local storage, requiring external storage volumes, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. This hardware configuration is optimized for workloads such as lightweight machine learning inference, video transcoding, and basic graphics rendering, offering a cost-effective entry point into GPU-accelerated cloud computing without the premium cost of newer generation accelerators.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 4 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a KVM-based instance with 4 dedicated vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual machine featuring dedicated physical cores and an NVIDIA P4 GPU for entry-level parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated x86_64 physical CPU cores with no hyperthreading
16.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM
No local storage included, requiring external storage attachment
Suited for lightweight machine learning inference and video transcoding
